steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: Modern technology enables searchers to locate hoards before putting the first shovel in the ground — intentional, systematic discovery. Pre-1960 hoards were found without these search tools.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B (result from artifacts being unearthed accidentally) directly expresses what follows when hoards are discovered without the technology for intentional searching.

The other choices address what hoards contained (A and C) or timing (D), which don't connect to discovery methods.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
